name: io.github.lo-nau/localgym-mcp-server
description: Read-only MCP server for UK gym search using the LocalGym Agent API.

environmentVariables.name: LOCALGYM_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Optional LocalGym API base URL override; defaults to https://localgym.uk.

environmentVariables.name: LOCALGYM_MCP_RATE_LIMIT_MAX
environmentVariables.description: Optional local MCP client-side rate limit per window; defaults to 60. The public API also enforces server-side limits.

environmentVariables.name: LOCALGYM_MCP_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS
environmentVariables.description: Optional local MCP client-side rate limit window in milliseconds; defaults to 60000.
